architecture.summary: Sync only in onIncrementDone, remove pre-sync from completeIncrement, no lightweight check needed

integrations.summary: GitHub API via gh CLI, GITHUB_TOKEN from PROJECT_ROOT/.env exported as GH_TOKEN

performance.summary: Eliminates 5000 API calls/hr zombie issue by removing fire-and-forget background sync

security.summary: Source GITHUB_TOKEN from .env instead of broken gh keyring

edge-cases.summary: Stale sync-*.lock cleanup >60min, concurrent completions out of scope, drift >168h is warning not error
